name: RABR-DK15-01 'Caleb'
description:
ENTROPHIC CONTROL TEAM, YOU ARE ASSIGNED WITH TASK CODE; CLAMP, CONTAIN, AND ESCORT MALIGNANT AGENT "ELIDIA YASOU" TO AUTHORITIES. FAILURE WILL RESULT IN PERK TERMINATION

Finally, the remastered Raven bot is complete, and you all have been waiting.

Full Designation: RABR — Recon Assault Biorecognition Replika

Callsign: Raven

Generation: VII

Production Cost Tier: High-Cost / Elite-Class Combat Unit

◇ Physical Specifications

■ Operational Height:

  • Without stilts: 5’6” (167 cm)

  • With leg stilts attached: Up to 7’3” (220 cm)

  • Frame Type: Advanced biomechanical combat chassis

---

■ Structural Composition

The RABR frame integrates cutting-edge biomechanical engineering optimized for front-line combat, reconnaissance, and target identification under extreme conditions.

  • Endoskeleton: Titanium–tungsten alloy skeletal structure designed to withstand sustained ballistic and blunt-force trauma

  • Outer Shell: Reinforced polyethylene composite casing, optimized for impact dispersion and environmental resistance

■ Mobility Systems:

  • High-speed servo arrays embedded throughout the lower and upper body

  • Detachable leg stilts allowing rapid transition between standard-height and elevated reconnaissance or assault posture

■ Armor Integration:

  • Bullet-resistant Kevlar layering

  • Ceramic armor padding at critical zones (torso, shoulders, upper legs)

■ Life Support Systems:

  • Reinforced biological lungs capable of operating in low-oxygen or contaminated environments

  • Hardened core-heart assembly with redundant life-sustaining systems to ensure continued operation after severe damage

■ Operational Role

RABR units—commonly referred to as Rabe or Raven—are elite Replika assets assigned to high-risk combat and intelligence operations. Their primary roles include:

  • Advanced reconnaissance in hostile or unknown environments

  • Assault leadership and shock engagement against fortified targets

  • Biorecognition and identification of hostile, friendly, or anomalous entities

RABR units are frequently deployed as **command or spearhead elements**, often leading cadres of STAR units or operating in close coordination with STCR unit cadres. Their elevated stature (when equipped with stilts) and commanding battlefield presence contribute both tactical advantages and psychological pressure against hostile forces.

■ Combat Performance Assessment

Field reports consistently note the RABR unit’s exceptional combat effectiveness, adaptability, and decisive brutality when engaged. Their design prioritizes:

  • Rapid target acquisition and elimination

  • Sustained combat endurance under prolonged engagem
creator: RABR-S2301 Caleb
